expected.notes: Owner is a US citizen filing 1120-S, breaking the first condition (owner_residency neq us_citizen_or_pr), so rule must not fire despite form_type match.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'nra_scorp_invalid', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - answers.owner_residency neq us_citizen_or_pr
  - extraction_b.form_type eq 1120-S
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
